query: SELECT o.id, o.name, o.slug FROM organizations o WHERE o.name LIKE '%Lodi%' OR o.slug LIKE '%lodi%'; SELECT vr.id, vr.organizationId, vr.testKey, vr.updatedAt FROM validationResults vr WHERE vr.organizationId IN (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE name LIKE '%Lodi%') ORDER BY vr.updatedAt ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT o.id, o.name, o.slug FROM organizations o WHERE o.name LIKE '%Lodi%' OR o.slug LIKE '%lodi%'; SELECT vr.id, vr.organizationId, vr.testKey, vr.updatedAt FROM validationResults vr WHERE vr.organizationId IN (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE name LIKE '%Lodi%') ORDER BY vr.updatedAt ASC;
